headline: Fortune Announces Third-Annual COO Summit 2026, Convening Leading Chief Operating Officers in Scottsdale, Arizona June 1 - 2
summary: Fortune today announced the return of the Fortune COO Summit, an invitation-only convening of senior operations leaders scheduled for June 1–2, 2026, at the Four Seasons Resort Scottsdale in Scottsdale, Arizona.

headline: Apptopia: OSB Mobile Apps Gain Monthly Users but See Engagement Fall
summary: Sports betting app engagement drops Power user engagement for the top OSB apps BOSTON, May 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Apptopia announces a new report on DraftKings Inc, Flutter Entertainment PLC, Caesars Entertainment Inc, MGM Resorts International, and the larger online sports betting market. This can be accessed in full here. The report gives an in-depth look at Q1 2026 mobile app performance trends for the DraftKings Sportsbook, FanDuel Sportsbook, and Kalshi mobile apps.
